name: @braintied/kimi-router
description: Local, health-aware Kimi credential router and Claude Code launcher

scripts.check: node --check router.mjs && node --check provider-adapters.mjs && node --check secret-store.mjs && node --check scripts/build-release.mjs && node --check install.mjs && node --check migrate-keychain.mjs && node --check relabel-accounts.mjs && zsh -n kimi
scripts.test: node provider-adapters.test.mjs && node secret-store.test.mjs && node relabel-accounts.test.mjs && node router.test.mjs && node router.v3.test.mjs && node state-lifecycle.test.mjs && node launcher.test.mjs
scripts.gate: npm run check && npm test && npm run secrets:check
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run gate && npm run artifact:check

author: Braintied
